field_proposals.rationale: Closed set describing claim payload type. Low coverage but stable.
Program/initiative or survey source name; relates to external entity, not an identity enum.
Domain-specific route change classification; small open set.
Frequency descriptor shorthand; thin occurrence but interpretable as open enum.
Proposed frequency descriptor; thin sample but consistent pattern.
Observed claim categories; very low sample but values are distinct and reasonable.
Array of improvement type terms, very low coverage but standard infrastructure categories.
Rail service names (e.g., LIRR, Metro-North) are external entities, not a closed enum.
Free-text description/title of the claim body; values are too diverse for enum.
Only one observed value ('feet'); cannot determine enumeration range.
Only two occurrences with two values; sample too thin to treat as stable enum.
Single accepted value ('multiline') and rejected submission suggest data is unreliable.
Unstructured date-range strings, better as free_text than limited enum.

key_dispositions.rationale: Single occurrence, not a core claim attribute.
Numeric count useful for claim context.
Raw date string superseded by date_text_normalized.
Structured date representation, essential claim metadata.
List of associated features; free_text array.
Structured location object, valuable claim property.
List of added route IDs, references external route entities.
Street names; relation to external geographic features.
Terminal description relates to external location reference.
Only one observed value ('fare_policy'); cannot assess enum scope.
Source data ordering metadata, not claim content.
Single route identifier referencing external route entity.
List of route IDs; multiple external references.
References to SBS routes, external entities.
Single observed value ('express_bus'); more data needed for enum.
Strategy names reference external program/initiative entities.
Free-text subject matter, meaningful claim metadata.
Subway line identifiers, relation to external services.
System name ('OMNY') is external payment system reference.
Tactic names reference external plan elements.
Year of claim; mixed types but should be numeric integer.

proposal.notes: Many enum candidates have low coverage; escape hatches are provided to accommodate unseen values. Relation_context keys reference external entities and are not canonicalized as enums. Date and location normalized objects should be defined in a structured schema (e.g., GeoJSON, ISO 8601).
